# Anisotropy Ratio

**Summary**: The ratio of vertical permeability to horizontal permeability.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-hakim|Hakim, 1994]] analyzed the effect of anisotropy ratio on critical rates.

## Scientific Context

- [[1994-hakim|Hakim, 1994]] Influences the shape and stability of the water cone.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1994-hakim|Hakim, 1994]] Modeled as a variable in simulation runs.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Higher values of k_y result in later breakthrough but lower overall productivity. ([[1994-hakim|Hakim, 1994, p. 57]])
